raw/rag-ops-source.md:11:Initial notes describe [[RAG Operations]] with [[Vector Store]] and [[Knowledge Graph]] responsibilities.
wiki/INDEX.md:16:- [[Vector Store]]
wiki/INDEX.md:19:- [[Vector Store vs Knowledge Graph]]
wiki/comparisons/Vector Store vs Knowledge Graph.md:2:title: "Vector Store vs Knowledge Graph"
wiki/comparisons/Vector Store vs Knowledge Graph.md:11:# Vector Store vs Knowledge Graph
wiki/comparisons/Vector Store vs Knowledge Graph.md:13:[[Vector Store]] retrieval emphasizes similarity search. [[Knowledge Graph]] retrieval emphasizes explicit relationships. [[RAG Operations]] can use both.
wiki/concepts/RAG Operations.md:12:  - "Vector Store"
wiki/concepts/RAG Operations.md:18:RAG operations coordinate [[Vector Store]], [[Knowledge Graph]], and [[Retrieval Precision]] maintenance. Eval loops use [[Evaluation Harness]] to keep changes measurable.
wiki/concepts/Retrieval Precision.md:10:  - "Vector Store"
wiki/concepts/Retrieval Precision.md:16:Retrieval precision depends on [[Vector Store]] indexing choices, [[Embedding Model]] quality, and operating discipline from [[RAG Operations]].
wiki/entities/Knowledge Graph.md:13:A knowledge graph complements [[Vector Store]] lookup and gives [[RAG Operations]] explicit relationship context.
wiki/entities/Vector Store.md:2:title: "Vector Store"
wiki/entities/Vector Store.md:11:# Vector Store
wiki/entities/Vector Store.md:13:A vector store supports [[RAG Operations]] and competes with graph-centric retrieval in [[Vector Store vs Knowledge Graph]].
